title: TypeScript type file fixes: UIChangelogEntry.createdAt, omitted relations comment, header comments
summary: Four targeted fixes to types/changelog.ts and types/planning.ts: added missing createdAt field to UIChangelogEntry, documented intentionally omitted relations on UIChangelogFeature, and translated both file header comments from German to English.
affected_users: Developers consuming UIChangelogEntry — createdAt was missing from the type
